evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Datakwaliteit, governance en betrouwbaarheid mee bewaakt
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Rigour signals dominate — data quality, governance, reliability, professionalisering van processen — with no velocity phrases present; classified as rigour.
evidence.domain_risk: maatschappelijke impact; K12 European learning company
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Education sector with societal impact framing; no financial reporting or regulatory compliance language; errors affect internal decisions not regulated outputs; classified as low.
evidence.collaboration_width: business teams; data-analisten en experts in Nederland
evidence.data_team_maturity: verdere professionalisering van processen, data infrastructuur en het dataplatform
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Small but established team (one peer in BE, larger group in NL); named tools appear in responsibilities (SQL, Snowflake, Power BI); 'verdere professionalisering' signals growing not early-stage; classified as mid.
evidence.jd_authorship: End-to-end oplossingen bouwt met SQL en Snowflake, Power BI en DBT; Meebouwt aan de verdere professionalisering van processen, data infrastructuur en het dataplatform
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Some technically specific bullets (named stack in responsibilities, platform-building scope) alongside generic ones (business teams ondersteunen, insights communiceren); classified as mixed.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Data literacy binnen de organisatie versterkt via begeleiding, workshops of kennisdeling; Meebouwt aan de verdere professionalisering van processen, data infrastructuur en het dataplatform
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Primary emphasis on building the data platform, data literacy, and professionalising internal data processes — classic internal_data orientation; business team support is secondary.
evidence.autonomy_level: veel autonomie om end-to-end oplossingen uit te bouwen; Business teams ondersteunt in projecten en besluitvorming
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Genuine split between autonomous end-to-end ownership (strategic) and supporting business teams (execution); classified as mixed.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Meebouwt aan de verdere professionalisering van processen, data infrastructuur en het dataplatform
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of building new dashboards/solutions (greenfield) and professionalising existing processes (fix_scale) with neither strongly dominant; classified as mixed.
evidence.language_gate: Je kan professioneel communiceren in het Frans of bent bereid dit verder te versterken

ai_role_quote: End-to-end oplossingen bouwt met SQL en Snowflake, Power BI en DBT
ai_role_reasoning: Stack lists traditional BI and SQL tools; no AI tooling, Copilot, Claude Code, or GenAI infrastructure mentioned.
testing_framing_quote: Datakwaliteit, governance en betrouwbaarheid mee bewakt
testing_framing_reasoning: Quality governance emphasized but no explicit testing ownership verbs (own, ensure, define, implement, establish).
loss_aversion_framing_quote: maatschappelijke impact; K12 European learning company
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Education sector with societal impact framing; no regulatory/compliance language and errors affect internal decisions not regulated outputs.
